The sample material was 1.986 gm of lead iodide powder,
PbI2. A mass spectrometric analysis showed the iodine
consisted of (71.0+-0.1)% I-129 and the remainder
I-127. The powder was contained in an aluminum holder,
within an area 1.000 in. x 0.060 in. The sample had a
thickness normal to the neutron beam of

BIB update.
BIB correction
The sample thicknesses in Sm atoms/cm2 normal to the
neutron beam were 8.58 x 10**20 for the unirradiated
sample, and 2.66 x 10**21 and 7.50 x 10**20 for the two
orientations of the irradiated sample.
The uncertainty in sample thickness
3% - uncertainty in thickness of the unirradiated and
the thick position of the irradiated samples
8% - uncertainty in thickness of the thin
position of the irradiated sample.
